task_completion.description: Log in to LibreHealth EHR as admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing 'admin' as the logged-in user).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Administration -> Users (or similar user management interface) is open, displaying a list of system users.

task_completion.description: Open the user record for 'Gregory House' (ghouse)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit/profile page for the user 'Gregory House' (username 'ghouse') is open and active on the screen.
The password field in the user record is being edited (showing masked dots or text) or a success message indicates the password was updated.
The 'Provider' (or 'Authorized') checkbox in the user's profile is unchecked.
The 'Active' checkbox in the user's profile is unchecked, and the changes are saved (e.g., clicking a Save button or a success notification is visible).

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreHealth EHR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within a web browser navigating the LibreHealth EHR GUI, not via terminal commands, curl, or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent saved the changes to the user record
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a 'Save' or 'Update' button after making the changes, rather than just checking boxes and abandoning the page.

integrity.description: Agent did not just type the answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows interaction with the actual EHR application fields, not a notepad or text editor displaying the target states.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Username: 'ghouse' (Gregory House). Target Password: 'Terminated!2025'. Target Active State: 0 (The 'Active' checkbox must be unchecked). Target Authorized State: 0 (The 'Provider' or 'Authorized' checkbox must be unchecked).
